scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Av-Global-Session-ID: 00fe2c47-42d9-4801-9379-5b83ad7d0000 Content-Type: application/sdp Require: sdp-anat Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=sips:84449900882@10.128.224.29 42 2 IN IP4 10.128.224.29 s=- c=IN IP4 10.128.224.29 b=TIAS:1088000 t=0 0 a=activetalker:1 a=group:ANAT 2 m=audio 5120 RTP/AVP 127 120 c=IN IP4 10.128.224.29 a=sendrecv a=ptime:20 a=rtpmap:127 OPUS/48000/2 a=fmtp:127 maxplaybackrate=16000; sprop-maxcapturerate=16000; maxaveragebitrate=20000; stereo=0; sprop-stereo=0; cbr=0; useinbandfec=1; usedtx=0 a=minptime:20 a=maxptime:20 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=mid:2 m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 127 120 c=IN IP6 :: a=mid:1 m=video 0 RTP/AVP 109 34 c=IN IP6 :: a=mid:3 m=video 0 RTP/AVP 109 34 c=IN IP4 0.0.0.0 a=mid:4

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Require: timer, sdp-anat Supported: replaces, sdp-anat Session-Expires: 90;refresher=uas Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1555582020 2 IN IP6 2001:e3:abcd:cafe:10:133:127:158 s=- c=IN IP4 10.128.224.81 b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=group:ANAT 2 a=activetalker:1 m=audio 5014 RTP/AVP 127 120 c=IN IP4 10.128.224.81 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:127 opus/48000/2 a=fmtp:127 maxaveragebitrate=20000;maxplaybackrate=16000;stereo=0;cbr=0;useinbandfec=1;usedtx=0;sprop-maxcapturerate=16000;sprop-stereo=0 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=maxptime:20 a=mid:2 a=minptime:20 m=audio 0 RTP/AVP 0 c=IN IP6 :: a=sendrecv a=mid:1 m=video 0 RTP/AVP 34 c=IN IP6 :: a=sendrecv a=mid:3 m=video 0 RTP/AVP 34 c=IN IP4 0.0.0.0 a=sendrecv a=mid:4
